name: SEPTIC ARTHRITIS

demographics.Location: shoulder, hip, knee, elbow, ankle; multifocal involvement common in the very young

dominant_finding: fat-fluid level in the absence of trauma (specific)
distribution: shoulder, hip, knee, elbow, ankle; multifocal involvement common in the very young
discriminating_features: fat-fluid level in the absence of trauma (specific)
perisynovial edema of adjacent soft tissue

MEDICAL EMERGENCY = treatment necessary within 48 hours to prevent irreversible
